data.title: Basis Theory raises $33 million to build AI-driven payments for commerce
data.description: The company employs more than 40 people. It plans to expand its engineering, product and go-to-market teams in the coming year.

data.title: Americans split on AI and robotics but see manufacturing promise
data.description: Half of respondents (44%) expect robotics to bring more manufacturing back to American soil.

data.title: Rexel’s U.S. and digital growth lift Q3 results
data.description: The electrical and industrial supplier said more customers are using online tools for ordering, pricing, and delivery.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: How shoppers will use AI this holiday season
data.description: New Deloitte survey data and new AI features shared by retailers at Salesforce's Dreamforce conference preview holiday use cases.

data.title: Visa and Mastercard both launch new agentic AI payments tools
data.description: Both Visa and Mastercard's moves follow other launches in artificial intelligence (AI) payments from OpenAI and Google.
